task_description: Extend the image uploader in ChatInputView to support pasting images from the macOS clipboard (Cmd+V) in addition to the existing file picker. Also allow sending image-only messages (no text required when images are attached).

verification.summary: swift build succeeded. swift test passed all 258 tests with 0 failures. No new tests were added because the changes are in a SwiftUI view behind #if os(macOS) guards on a Linux-based sandbox, and the existing test infrastructure tests model/service logic rather than views. The code changes are minimal (31 net new lines) and follow established codebase patterns.
